title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

plan.objective: Verify that the static import fix for mkdirSync in src/store/graph.ts is correctly implemented and that all gate commands pass, confirming the bug fix for CART-B01 is complete.
key_changes: Verify mkdirSync is statically imported from 'fs' in src/store/graph.ts
Confirm save() function has no await expressions
Run npm run build to validate TypeScript compilation
Run npm test to verify all 31 tests pass including regression guard
Run npm run lint to ensure code quality standards
Update CLAUDE.md known issues section for CART-B01

review_plan.objective: Review the plan for CART-S01-T01 to verify it correctly addresses the CART-B01 mkdirSync static import fix and all gate commands pass.

Confirmed no 'await' keyword exists in graph.ts — save() is fully synchronous
Verified mkdirSync is called before writeFileSync in save() — correct order
npm run build exits 0 — TypeScript compilation clean
npm test passes 31/31 tests including CART-B01 regression guard
npm run lint exits 0 — no ESLint warnings or errors
